title: Mango Hunger Bar
description: Replaces the Vanilla Hunger Bar Icons to be Mangoes instead of the drumsticks. Compatible with the AppleSkin Mod
body:
# Art's Mango Hunger Bar
**This Resource Pack Replaces the Vanilla Hunger Bar Icons to be Mangoes instead of the drumsticks.**

![In game screenshot showing the Mango hunger bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7b4f81c649e171ee5881182f8d09b149d1c6a00.png)
![In game screenshot showing the Mango hunger bar when the player has the Hunger debuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1b92f3afea83c07814a9b4fdad0ee2fb2ef4ac7.png)

**This Resource pack is also Compatible with the AppleSkin Mod!**

![In game screenshot of the mouse cursor hovering over steak in the inventory to show off it's compatibility with the appleskin mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7161a3e6ad1c4fcce3dceebf48b738481bf43934.png)
